title: Ranunculus austrokarelicus
taxonomy: Ranunculus austrokarelicus is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is native to Asia and Europe. It belongs to the genus Ranunculus, which is a group of about 600 species of plants commonly known as buttercups. Ranunculus austrokarelicus is further divided into two subspecies, Ranunculus austrokarelicus subsp. austrokarelicus and Ranunculus austrokarelicus subsp. tibeticus. The plant's classification is based on its physical characteristics, including its flower and leaf structure.
